ingredients_text: Soy protein isolate, sugar, soluble corn fiber, vegetable oil (palm kernel and palm oil, soybean and palm oil with tbhq for freshness), strawberry flavored fruit pieces (sugar, cranberries, citric acid, natural strawberry flavor with other natural flavors, elderberry juice concentrate for color, sunflower oil), corn syrup, fructose, inulin, milk protein isolate, contains 2% or less of dextrose, water, nonfat yogurt powder (cultured whey protein concentrate, cultured skim milk, yogurt cultures; heat-treated after culturing), glycerin, color added, sorbitol, soy lecithin, natural and artificial flavor, salt, citric acid, strawberry juice concentrate, xanthan gum, bht for freshness, partially defatted peanut flour, almond flour, wheat starch. vitamins and minerals: calcium carbonate, vitamin c (ascorbic acid), vitamin e (alpha tocopherol acetate), niacinamide, zinc oxide, reduced iron, vitamin b6 (pyridoxine hydrochloride), vitamin a palmitate, vitamin b2 (riboflavin), vitamin b1 (thiamin hydrochloride), vitamin b12, folic acid, vitamin d3.
ingredients_text_debug: INGREDIENTS: SOY PROTEIN ISOLATE, SUGAR SOLUBLE CORN FIBER VEGETABLE OIL (PALM KERNEL AND PALM OIL, SOYBEAN AND PALM OIL WITH TBHQ FOR FRESHNESS), STRAWBERRY FLAVORED FRUIT PIECES(SUGAR CRANBERRIES, CITRIC ACID NATURAL STRAWBERRY FLAVOR WITH OTHER : NATURAL FLAVORS : ELDERBERRY JUICE CONCENTRATE FOR COLOR, SUNFLOWER OIL). CORN SYRUP, FRUCTOSE INULIN, MILK PROTEIN ISOLATE CONTAINS 2% OR LESS OF DEXTROSE WATER NONFAT YOGURT POWDER (CULTURED WHEY PROTEIN CONCENTRATE CULTURED SKIM MILK YOGURT CULTURES HEAT-TREATED AFTER CULTURING) GLYCERIN COLOR ADDED, SORBITOL SOY LECITHIN NATURAL AND ARTIFICIAL FLAVOR SALT CITRIC ACID STRAWBERRY JUICE CONCENTRATE, XANTHAN GUM BHT FOR FRESHNESS PARTIALLY DEFATTED PEANUT FLOUR ALMOND FLOUR WHEAT STARCH VITAMINS AND MINERALS: CALCIUM CARBONATE, VITAMIN C (ASCORBIC ACID), VITAMIN E (ALPHA TOCOPHEROL ACETATE) NIACINAMIDE, ZINC OXIDE, REDUCED IRON, VITAMIN B (PYRIDOXINE HYDROCHLORIDE) VITAMIN A PALMITATE,VITAMIN B2 (RIBOFLAVIN), VITAMIN B (THIAMIN HYDROCHLORIDE) VITAMIN B1.2,FOLIC ACID, VITAMIN D CONTAINS SOY, MILK, PEANUT, ALMOND AND WHEAT INGREDIENTS. MAY CONTAIN OTHER TREE NUTS

ingredients_text_es: Proteina de soya aislada, azúcar, fibra soluble de maiz, aceite vegetal [palmiste y palma, soya y palma con TBHQ (antioxidante) para mantener la frescura], trocitos de fruta con sabor a fresa (azúcar, arándanos, ácido citrico (acidulante), saborizantes naturales a fresa, jugo de saúco concentrado [color], aceite vegetal (aceite de girasol)), jarabe de maiz, fructosa, inulina, proteína aislada de leche, contiene 2 % o menos de dextrosa, agua, yogur sin grasa en polvo (sólidos de la leche y cultivo láctico), glicerina (humectante), dióxido de titanio (color), sorbitol (humectante), lecitina de soya (emulsificante), saborizante natural y artificial a fresa, sal, ácido citrico (acidulante), jugo de fresa concentrado, goma xantana (emulsificante), BHT (antioxidante) para mantener la frescura, harina de cacahuate parcialmente desgrasada, harina de almendra, almidón (almidón de trigo). VITAMINAS Y MINERALES: Carbonato de calcio, vitamina C (ácido ascórbico), vitamina E (acetato alfa tocoferol), niacinamida (niacina), óxido de zinc, hierro reducido, vitamina B6 (hidrodoruro de piridoxina), vitamina A (palmitato), vitamina B2 (riboflavina), vitamina B1 (hidrocloruro de tiamina), vitamina B12, ácido fólico, vitamina D3.
